ber:Yella ccek d ameqran dakken lxedma n waya mačči d taɣawsa tasneknayt

ber:Sami yenna-d dakken d netta umi yeḍra waya
ber:Ur yessaweḍ ara ad yeṭṭef iman-is, ur yettaḍṣa ara ɣef waya
ber:Yessefk ad tḥeṛsemt iman-nwent deg tezrawin ugar n waya s waṭas

ber:Cikkeɣ dakken yezmer ad d-yettwassewjed waya

ber:Xdem ayen i ilaqen akken ur yettεawad ara ad d-yeḍru waya

ber:Ur zmireɣ ara ad d-ssugeɣ dakken yenfel waya
ber:Yanni yettxemmim dakken yezmer ad yexdem xir n waya
ber:Sami werεad ur ixemmem ara ula d axemmem ɣef waya
ber:Mary tenna-iyi-d dakken ur tt-yesseqneε ara waya
ber:Teɣsemt ad d-tinimt maci mgal waya ay tellamt﹖

ber:Ur walaɣ ara d acu n tmentilt yellan akken ur d-yettili ara waya
ber:D tiswuta aya seg wasmi i d-yebda waya deg Dzayer

ber:Yezmer ad yefk qrib akk ayen yesɛa i lmend n waya
ber:Yezmer ad yefk qrib akk ayen ila i lmend n waya
ber:Azal n umahil-inu meqqer acḥal n tikkal ugar waya
